# Test Fixture Attributions

These legal documents are used as test fixtures for Quill's document analysis pipeline. All are open-source and licensed under terms that permit redistribution.

## Sources

### papertrail/legal-docs
- **License:** CC0 1.0 (Public Domain)
- **URL:** https://github.com/papertrail/legal-docs
- **Files:** `nda/papertrail-short.md`, `nda/papertrail-corporate.md`, `nda/papertrail-employee.md`

- **License:** CC0 1.0 (Public Domain)
- **URL:** https://github.com/numtide/software-consulting-documents
- **Files:** `nda/numtide-consulting.md`
